items.label: Johto-only challenge: team ≤ Lv 65
items.note: For 'To Train Them Is My Cause' — defeat Red in Set battle style, using only Johto Pokémon that never exceed Lv 65 in battle, and without using any Pack items.

items.label: Recommended counter
items.note: Red can be rematched after each League clear, so refine later if needed. A diverse high-level team is recommended — Piloswine, Skarmory, Crobat, the Legendary Beasts, or your starter.
